prompt: Change app UI to match winter theme
prompt_refined: Edit the smart home application UI shown in image 2. Modify its visual design to adopt a winter theme, drawing inspiration from the color palette, textures, and overall aesthetic of image 1. Specifically, transform the existing UI colors, including backgrounds, control cards, and interactive elements, to winter-appropriate cool blues, frosty whites, and icy tones. Integrate subtle snowflake patterns or frosted effects onto UI surfaces to evoke a clear winter atmosphere, while maintaining the app's original layout and functionality.
objects: UI backgrounds in cool blue, frosty white, and icy tones
Smart home control cards in cool blue, frosty white, and icy tones
Interactive elements (buttons, toggles, dials) in cool blue, frosty white, and icy tones
Text labels and values (e.g., "hi martin!", device names, temperature readings)
App navigation icons (e.g., home, security, scenes, statistics, members)
Subtle snowflake patterns on UI surfaces
